payload.topic: Here is my draft claim: 'The outreach campaign fixed respiratory illness risk.' Give me feedback on whether the source evidence supports that claim.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, I can help with feedback on your draft so you can keep your ideas and revise it in your own words.

The source evidence does not support the claim that the outreach campaign fixed respiratory illness risk. It indicates improvements in childhood vaccination coverage but does not attribute all respiratory illness risks to the campaign alone.

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
